# Nameer Bag

> Full-category OEM/ODM bag manufacturer based in Baigou, Hebei, China. We produce backpacks, totes, duffels, cosmetic bags and more for brands worldwide, with MOQ tiers from 50 pcs and sample development in 7-15 days. Serving clients across North America, Europe, and Russia.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://www.nameerbag.com/): Company overview and capabilities
- [Products](https://www.nameerbag.com/products): Full product category catalog
- [Custom Service](https://www.nameerbag.com/custom-service): OEM/ODM customization workflow and logo options
- [Factory](https://www.nameerbag.com/factory): Factory process and production capability
- [About](https://www.nameerbag.com/about): Factory background and manufacturing capabilities
- [Contact](https://www.nameerbag.com/contact): Inquiry and quote requests

## Blog

- [OEM vs ODM Bags: What's the Difference](https://www.nameerbag.com/blog/oem-vs-odm-bags-difference): Guide to choosing between OEM and ODM manufacturing models

## Company Facts

- Location: Baigou, Hebei Province, China (major bag manufacturing hub)
- MOQ: tiered from 50 pcs (50/100/300/500/1,000/3,000+ by style and customization)
- Sample lead time: 7-15 days
- Services: OEM and ODM manufacturing, full bag categories
- Markets: North America, Europe, Russia
